properties.property: The fork was initiated to implement a modification in the Conan recipe. The original recipe had a dependency on the zlib library. However, for the specific needs of our project, it was necessary to replace this dependency with zlib-ng. The zlib-ng library offers certain advantages such as enhanced performance and additional features, which are necessary for the successful execution of our project. Additionally, option was not provided to disable some CMake variables in the original recipe. Importantly, the recipe option 'shared' was not used to set the 'BUILD_SHARED_LIBS' CMake variable.

The necessity for this fork will cease when the upstream project incorporates an option to utilize the zlib-ng library in the Conan recipe, use the 'shared' recipe option to explicitly set the 'BUILD_SHARED_LIBS' CMake variable and provide an option to set the 'ENABLE_PCRE2POSIX' CMake variable.

The maintenance of this fork may require periodic pulls from the upstream project to ensure alignment with the latest updates and improvements. There exists a possibility for contributing changes back to the upstream project. This is contingent on the relevance and applicability of these changes to the broader user base of the upstream project. Such contributions are made as required and are in line with the collaborative spirit of open-source development.
